main.description: A personal, freely-ordered grouping of works already on one's own shelf — the primary way a shelf is organized and presented to visitors, not a side list. No implied sequence, mood, or algorithm beyond what the person themselves chose. Only works already on the author's shelf.item collection may appear here — enforced by the appview at write time, not by this schema.

works.description: Order is the array order — entirely the author's own choice, not derived from any criteria the system understands.

order.description: Position relative to this account's other nooks — gapped (e.g. multiples of 1000) so moving one nook only ever rewrites that one record, not every nook. Optional: absent on nooks written before this field existed, which fall back to creation order.

style.description: A small, curated set of presentation choices — not a free color picker. Keeps every profile visually coherent with the product's own design system while still letting each nook feel distinct.
